inherited_shortcomings.shortcoming: PV-only outcome in Case 1 and Case 2 — BESS question never answered
inherited_shortcomings.case_3_mitigation: Mandatory storage_floor via hard min_kw > 0 and min_kwh > 0 bounds in bounded-optimization lane.

inherited_shortcomings.shortcoming: Load and market basis mismatched across sites
inherited_shortcomings.case_3_mitigation: Both load and market series come from saigon18. site_consistency_block enforces same_site_basis=True.

inherited_shortcomings.shortcoming: Strike sweep anchored too far from real-project notes
inherited_shortcomings.case_3_mitigation: Strike anchors at 5% below EVN (user decision) with explicit sensitivity sweep 0-20%.

inherited_shortcomings.shortcoming: Optimizer-vs-controller gap hidden in narrative text
inherited_shortcomings.case_3_mitigation: Controller-style dispatch sensitivity is a first-class Phase E output, not a footnote.

inherited_shortcomings.shortcoming: Sensitivities widened around a rejected base case instead of changing assumptions
inherited_shortcomings.case_3_mitigation: Case 3 changes foundational assumptions (site-consistent data, mandatory storage, bounded opt) before any sensitivity work.

inherited_shortcomings.shortcoming: No tariff branch comparison — only one tariff tested
inherited_shortcomings.case_3_mitigation: Two tariff branches (22kV two-part + legacy TOU) with side-by-side delta reporting.
Bounded optimization starts from real-project reference sizes (3.2 MWp / 1 MW / 2.2 MWh) and allows narrow envelope only.
